stories.title: Aaron Rai Wins PGA Championship — First English Winner in 107 Years
stories.angle: An historic, against-all-odds upset at golf's oldest major — how Rai pulled it off and what it means for golf.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
AARON RAI WINS THE PGA CHAMPIONSHIP. 🏆

-9 total. Final-round 65. Won by 3 shots.

290-1 odds. The first English winner since 1919. The biggest long-shot major winner in 20+ years.

What a Sunday at Aronimink. 🤯 #PGAChampionship #Golf

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Aaron Rai at Aronimink, Sunday:

• 40-foot eagle on No. 9
• One-putted 7 straight greens
• 68-foot birdie to seal it on No. 17
• Final-round 65, wins by 3

$3.6 million. First English PGA champion in 107 years. 🏆 #PGAChampionship

article.headline: Aaron Rai Wins PGA Championship at 290-1 — First English Winner in 107 Years

stories.title: McIlroy's Grand Slam Dream Dies at Aronimink
stories.angle: The agony of what could have been — McIlroy still sits one major short of the career Grand Slam.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy's calendar Grand Slam bid is over.

Finished -4, five shots back. Bogeyed the drivable par-4 13th. Couldn't birdie either par 5.

He still needs the PGA Championship to complete the career Grand Slam. The wait continues. #Golf #PGAChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
When Rory McIlroy is asked about the Grand Slam, the answer will always come back to this:

He had his chances. He needed to make birdies on the par 5s. He didn't.

The goal doesn't get easier next time. #Golf #RoryMcIlroy

article.headline: McIlroy's Grand Slam Bid Ends at Aronimink — Five Shots and a Season's Worth of Frustration

stories.title: Smalley Collapses, Rahm Holds — T2 for Both
stories.angle: Smalley's collapse opened the door for Rai's historic surge.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Alex Smalley led the PGA Championship at 54 holes.

Then: double bogey on 6, bogey on 8.

He finished T2 at -6 with Jon Rahm — best career major result by far.

Aaron Rai was the one who kept his head when everyone else lost theirs. #PGAChampionship #Golf

article.headline: Smalley's Sunday Collapse Opens the Door — Rahm and Smalley Share T2 as Rai Runs Away

stories.title: Scheffler's Title Defense Ends Quietly — Tied 14th
stories.angle: The defending champion narrative — what went wrong for Scheffler and what the T14 says about where his game sits.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler led after Round 1 at the PGA Championship — a career first in a major.

He finished tied 14th at -2.

The world No. 1 hasn't won a major yet in 2026. He'll be back — he always is. #PGAChampionship #Golf

article.headline: Scheffler Can't Conjure Final-Round Magic — World No. 1 Finishes T14 in Title Defense

stories.title: After Aronimink — McIlroy Eyes US Open, Women's Golf Up Next
stories.angle: What comes next for golf's biggest names — and why the back half of 2026 has enormous stakes.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
PGA Championship is done. What's next in golf?

⛳ LPGA ShopRite Classic: May 29-31, Seaview, NJ
🏆 US Women's Open: June 4-7, Riviera CC, CA
🏆 US Open: June 2026 (McIlroy's next Grand Slam shot)

The major season is just warming up. #Golf #LPGA
